chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1738 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of MA No.8529/2021. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Kamaluddin advocate for respondents. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. This petition was filed in the year 2021 and lastly fixed in Court on 17.02.2025 when following order was passed:- “None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. The petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution, however, in the interest of justice and as a last chance, adjourned to 24.02.2025. Issue intimation notice to the petitioners and their counsel.” Today also none is present on behalf of the petitioners no any intimation is received. It shows that the petitioners have lost their interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
